title: chelidonium phoeniceum
intro: Chelidonium phoeniceum, also known as celandine, is a flowering plant species in the poppy family Papaveraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Chelidonium phoeniceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support liver and kidney function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and ointments, and is also used externally to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
